description: Style NoteThis wallet from hidekraft is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic wallet.Product DetailsThree fold textured black leather wallet with embossed branding on the frontTwo main compartmentsThree credit card slots and an id card slot on the upper left flapTwo credit card slots, an id card slot and a slip pocket in the leftCoin pocket on right with slip pocketWarranty: 180 daysMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlightSize11 cm x 9 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
